case_title: LEWIS, FRONDLIA VS BILAFER, RICHARD DBA B&A BODYWORKS et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
